stemHtml: According to the OPS Regulations, which one of the following statements concerning the landing distance for a turbojet aeroplane is correct?

options.a: Malfunctioning of an anti-skid system has no effect on the required runway length.
options.b: Reverse thrust is one of the factors always taken into account when determining the landing distance required.
options.c: When determining the maximum allowable landing mass at destination, 60 % of the available landing runway length should be taken into account.
options.d: The landing distance is the distance from 35 ft above the surface of the runway to the full stop.
